services.title: Web Development
services.shortDescription: Custom-built, fast, typed websites, not template builders.
services.valueProp: A site built from scratch around your content and goals, engineered for speed and search visibility from the first commit.
services.problem: Template builders (WordPress/Elementor/Wix) ship bloated, slow, hard-to-maintain sites that cap how fast and how well a business can rank or convert.
deliverables: Performance budget enforced at every layer
approach: Build in a typed, component-based stack

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.shortDescription: Native-feeling iOS and Android apps, built cross-platform or native.
services.valueProp: A mobile app scoped honestly to your actual reach and budget: cross-platform where it fits, native where performance demands it.
services.problem: Many studios oversell "native" delivery or undersell the real cost/timeline tradeoffs between cross-platform and native development.
deliverables: App Store and Google Play submission support
approach: Platform and architecture decision (cross-platform vs native)
Development in sprints with staging builds

services.title: Custom Systems (CMS / ERP)
services.shortDescription: Internal tools, CMS, and ERP systems built around how your team works.
services.valueProp: A system shaped to your actual workflow, not the other way around, replacing spreadsheets and rigid off-the-shelf software.
services.problem: Off-the-shelf CMS/ERP software forces teams to bend their process to the tool, creating workarounds and shadow spreadsheets.

services.title: Student & Final Year Project Support
services.shortDescription: Hands-on help building the website, app, or system behind your final year project or coursework.
services.valueProp: A working, well-documented project you actually understand, built alongside you so you can explain and defend every part of it.
services.problem: Many students get stuck between an ambitious project brief and the time or coding skill to deliver it before a fixed graduation deadline.
deliverables: Working website, app, or system matching your project brief
Guidance sessions so you understand every part of your own project
Revision support before submission and viva
approach: Brief review: understand your requirements and rubric
Planning: scope that realistically fits your timeline
Build: development in checkpoints you can follow
Walkthrough: a session so you can present and defend the work
Handover: full documentation before your deadline
tools: Stack matched to your brief (web, mobile, or systems)

faq.question: Will I understand the project well enough to present it?
faq.answer: Yes. We walk through the codebase and architecture with you before submission so you can explain and defend every decision.

faq.question: Can you match the tech stack my university requires?
faq.answer: Yes. We build in whatever stack your brief or supervisor specifies, from PHP and Java to React and Python.

services.title: AI Development
services.shortDescription: LLM-powered features, integrations, and automation, scoped honestly.
services.valueProp: AI integrated where it genuinely improves a workflow or product, with clear boundaries between AI integration and custom ML.
services.problem: Most "AI-powered" claims are a thin wrapper with no real engineering behind them, or vague promises that collapse under technical scrutiny.
deliverables: Evaluation and monitoring for AI features

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.shortDescription: Interface design grounded in usability, not just visual trend.
services.valueProp: Design that is measured by whether users complete the task, not by how it looks in a static mockup.
services.problem: Visually striking designs that ignore usability, accessibility, or implementation cost create expensive rework later.

services.title: Maintenance & Support
services.shortDescription: Ongoing care after launch, covering uptime, security, and continuous improvement.
services.valueProp: A direct line to the people who built your system, so issues get fixed by people who already understand the codebase.
services.problem: Sites and systems left unmaintained accumulate security risk, broken integrations, and slow performance regression over time.

services.title: Digital Marketing
services.shortDescription: SEO, paid ads, and full social media management for data-driven growth.
services.valueProp: A marketing setup that brings the right people to your business consistently, not just a spike of traffic with no follow-through.
services.problem: Most businesses run ads without a strategy, post on social without a plan, and can't tell which channel is actually driving revenue.
deliverables: Google Ads and Meta Ads campaign setup and management
Ongoing social media post creation, scheduling, and community replies
Monthly analytics report with actionable insights
approach: Audit current digital presence and competitors
Define target audience and channel priorities
Build and launch campaigns with tracking in place

faq.question: How long before I see results?
faq.answer: SEO typically shows traction in 3-6 months. Paid ads can deliver leads from week one. We set realistic expectations per channel in the initial strategy call.

faq.question: Do you manage ads or just set them up?
faq.answer: We do both: setup and ongoing management with weekly optimisation. One-time setup without management rarely performs well.

services.title: Business Growth
services.shortDescription: Growth strategy, market positioning, and go-to-market execution for startups and SMEs.
services.valueProp: A clear, executable growth plan built around your actual market, not generic advice, so you grow in the direction that makes sense for your stage.
services.problem: Most startups and SMEs know what they want to build but not how to position it, price it, or get in front of the right customers at the right time.
approach: Discovery: understand your business, customers, and market
Research: competitive landscape and positioning gaps
Strategy: define positioning, channels, and targets
Review: measure, iterate, and re-plan quarterly

faq.question: Is this consulting or execution?
faq.answer: Primarily strategy and planning, but we stay involved through the execution phase to make sure the plan is actually implemented. We don't hand you a deck and disappear.

faq.question: Do you work with pre-revenue startups?
faq.answer: Yes. The approach adjusts: pre-revenue focuses on validation and GTM; post-revenue focuses on scaling what's working and fixing what's not.

services.title: Branding & Identity
services.shortDescription: Brand identity, product photography, and social media visuals: assets that make your brand stick.
services.valueProp: A brand that looks consistent, professional, and intentional at every touchpoint, from your logo to your product shots to your Instagram grid.
services.problem: Inconsistent visuals, DIY logos, and low-quality product photos undermine trust before a customer even reads your copy.
deliverables: Logo design and brand identity system
Social media post templates (Canva or Figma)
approach: Brand discovery: values, audience, and reference direction
Refinement: one direction developed to completion
Handover: all source files and brand guide

faq.question: Do I get source files?
faq.answer: Yes, all final files in AI, EPS, PNG, and SVG formats, plus your brand guide as a PDF and editable Figma/Canva templates.

faq.question: Can you do product photography outside a studio?
faq.answer: Yes. We do studio tabletop shoots for products and on-location shoots where the environment adds to the story.

services.title: Product Photoshoot & Marketing
services.shortDescription: Professional product photography paired with marketing campaigns that put those visuals to work.
services.valueProp: Studio-quality product shots and the campaign to match, with one team handling the shoot, the creative, and the ads, so your visuals actually sell.
services.problem: Great products lose sales to bad photos, and even good photos sit unused because nobody turns them into ads, listings, and social content that convert.
deliverables: Retouched, e-commerce-ready images (white background, lifestyle, detail shots)
Ad creatives and social media posts built from the shoot
Campaign setup and management using the new visuals
approach: Brief: product, audience, and platform requirements
Shoot planning: styling, props, and shot list
Post-production: retouch, colour, and platform exports
Marketing: launch ads and content using the new assets

faq.question: Do I need to send my products to you?
faq.answer: For studio shoots, yes: we arrange collection or delivery within the Klang Valley. For bulky products or venue-based businesses, we shoot on-location at your premises.

faq.question: Can I use the photos anywhere?
faq.answer: Yes. You receive full usage rights to all final images, delivered in high resolution plus web-optimised and platform-specific crops.

services.title: Media Creation
services.shortDescription: Video production, Reels, content series, and digital media: scroll-stopping creative for every platform.
services.valueProp: Polished video and visual content built for how people actually consume, from short-form for social to long-form for YouTube and product demos for sales.
services.problem: Businesses know they need video content but lack the production quality, editing, or consistency to build an audience or convert viewers.
deliverables: Long-form video (YouTube, website hero, product demos)
approach: Brief: define content goals, audience, and platform
Production: shoot or record (studio / on-location / screen capture)

faq.question: Do you shoot on-site or remotely?
faq.answer: Both. On-site for product, brand, and interview content; remote/screen-capture for tutorials, SaaS demos, and webinars.

faq.question: How many revisions are included?
faq.answer: Two rounds of edit revisions are included per video. We structure briefs well upfront to reduce revision cycles.

services.title: Grant & Government Project Support
services.shortDescription: From grant paperwork to the funded deliverable itself, built and delivered to the scheme's requirements.
services.valueProp: One partner to help you apply for the right digitalisation grant, then build the exact digital project the grant is funding, on time and to spec.
services.problem: SME digitalisation grants require both paperwork and a real, working digital deliverable, and most applicants struggle to execute the technical side once funding is approved.
deliverables: Grant eligibility review and application support
Scoped project proposal matching the grant's requirements
The funded website, system, or digital tool, built and delivered
Compliance documentation for disbursement and audit
Support through the grant's reporting period
approach: Assess: which grant fits your business and project
Apply: prepare the application and supporting documents
Build: deliver the digital project the grant is funding
Report: documentation and evidence for compliance
Support: assistance through the reporting window

faq.question: Which grants do you work with?
faq.answer: Malaysian SME digitalisation grants such as Geran Digital PMKS and the MADANI SME Digitalisation Grant, along with other schemes your business may qualify for.

faq.question: Do you help with the grant application itself?
faq.answer: Yes. We help assess eligibility and prepare the application, then deliver the actual digital project once the grant is approved.

services.title: Business Startup Package
services.shortDescription: Everything a new small business needs to launch, brand, website, systems, and a first marketing push, bundled into one engagement.
services.valueProp: A single team handling your logo, your website, the systems to run day-to-day operations, and the marketing push to get your first customers.
services.problem: First-time founders end up hiring several different freelancers for logo, website, and ads, and none of it looks or works like one coherent business.
deliverables: Brand identity: logo, colours, and basic guidelines
Simple ordering, booking, or inventory system, if needed
Social media setup and first content batch
Launch marketing push (ads or organic campaign)
approach: Discovery: your business idea, budget, and timeline
Systems: whatever operational tool your business needs to run
Launch: social presence and first marketing push
Handover: a business that is live, branded, and ready for customers
tools: Branding, web, systems, and marketing stack, combined

faq.question: What if I only need some of this, not everything?
faq.answer: That's fine. The package is a starting bundle. We'll scope it down or up to match what your business actually needs.

faq.question: How long does a full launch package take?
faq.answer: Most startup packages take 4 to 8 weeks depending on scope, from first discovery call to a live, branded business.
